svg.title: Four-rung responsible gambling escalation ladder
svg.desc: Editorial ladder for responsible-gambling escalation, from lightest intervention on the bottom rung to strongest on the top. Rung one, set limits before you play: time, budget and loss limits set in advance while calm. Rung two, use operator-side self-exclusion: cooling off periods from 24 hours to permanent, plus removal from marketing. Rung three, cross-operator device blocking with tools such as GamBan, Gamblock and BetBlocker, plus bank-side gambling-category merchant blocks. Rung four, professional and crisis help through free confidential 24/7 hotlines: US 1-800-GAMBLER, Canada ConnexOntario 1-866-531-2600, UK GamCare 0808 8020 133, and the US 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline.
svg.text: Escalate at your own pace; every rung is legitimate and free to use

g.text: Free, confidential 24/7 hotlines when you or someone you know needs to talk to a person now
US 1-800-GAMBLER (text HELP to same): US 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline: UK GamCare 0808 8020 133: CA ConnexOntario 1-866-531-2600
Device-level tools that block thousands of sweepstakes and gambling sites at once, plus bank-side card controls
GamBan: Gamblock: BetBlocker (free): bank app gambling-category merchant blocks (single tap, very effective)
Every legitimate operator offers Cooling Off, Self-Exclusion, or Account Limits in account settings
Cooling off 24h / 7d / 30d / 90d: permanent self-exclusion: marketing opt-out: coin-purchase block during limits
Set limits before you play, not after
Decide in advance while calm; treat any coin-package purchase as an already-spent movie-ticket cost
Time limit (phone alarm): monthly budget cap: loss limit set in account (not when chasing)

svg.text: Skip rungs freely: if 1 or 2 is not enough, go straight to 3, and never wait to call a helpline if you are in crisis.
Source: SweepstakesWiz Responsible Gaming page, July 2026. Not medical advice; hotlines are free, confidential, and 24/7.
